session_summary: Architecture validation phase. All factual claims verified (33 correct, 16 wrong, 3 unverifiable — 33% error rate). Now running architecture SENTIMENT validation — 4 agents checking whether community agrees with our architectural choices, not just whether numbers are right.
critical_state: 4 architecture validation agents running. Results will determine if architecture needs revision before installation. DO NOT INSTALL until validation results are reviewed with John.
architecture_validation_process: Documented in wiki/architecture-validation-process.md. 52 questions in wiki/architecture-validation-questions.md. Process: fresh inventory → categorize → hypothesize → validate → iterate → compare → only then build.
key_insight_this_session: Verifying facts (star counts, package names) is not the same as validating architecture (is this the right design?). 33% of factual claims were wrong. The architectural assumptions haven't been challenged yet.
agents_running: Fresh community inventory — unbiased sentiment about autonomous AI April 2026
OpenClaw validation — criticisms, problems, what people switch to
Memory architecture validation — is Obsidian+SQLite+tiered loading what production uses?
Component validation — MCP, OpenRouter, Telegram, VPS testing, SearXNG, autonomy, self-improvement
